items.title: Somalia: Saudi Arabia Executes Three Somali Nationals Convicted of Hashish Smuggling
items.description: [Shabelle] Riyadh -- Saudi Arabia has on Sunday executed three Somali nationals convicted of smuggling hashish into the kingdom, the Interior Ministry said, as the Gulf state continues to carry out capital punishment for drug-related offences despite mounting criticism from human rights groups.
items.titleIt: Somalia: Saudi Arabia Executes Three Somali Nationals Convicted of Hashish Smuggling

items.title: EU imposes visa restrictions on Somalis after readmission row with Mogadishu
items.description: The European Union is imposing new restrictions on visas for Somali nationals after a disagreement with Mogadishu over the return of irregular migrants to their home country.
items.titleIt: EU imposes visa restrictions on Somalis after readmission row with Mogadishu

items.title: Top Somali official deported from Kenya over suspected passport fraud
items.description: Somalia’s Second Deputy Prime Minister was deported from Kenya on Thursday over allegations of passport fraud, according to numerous reports.
items.titleIt: Top Somali official deported from Kenya over suspected passport fraud

items.title: Ethiopia: TPLF Rejects EU Criticism, Says Govt Violating Peace Deal
items.description: [Reporter] The Tigray People's Liberation Front (TPLF) has rejected European Union accusations that it is undermining Ethiopia's 2022 peace agreement, instead accusing the federal government of violating the accord and warning that the Tigray region faces a growing risk of renewed conflict.
items.titleIt: Ethiopia: TPLF Rejects EU Criticism, Says Govt Violating Peace Deal
